description_long: This object is a compact, vintage-style sewing machine with a robust, rectangular body finished in a dark teal color. The top section is rounded and houses the main drive mechanism, while the lower section features a sturdy metal column supporting the base. A black cylindrical motor is mounted on the side, connected by visible yellow power cables. The front face includes a prominent hexagonal knob and a small lever, with two labeled levers ('PULL' and 'PUSH') on the side for operational control. The base is wide and flat, providing stability, and there are two black platforms for fabric support and operation.
description: A compact, vintage teal sewing machine with a rounded top, side-mounted motor, and sturdy base, featuring visible control levers and power cables.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main body, hexagonal knob, yellow cables, and the black motor on the left side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the machine's narrow profile, rounded top, and the protruding control levers at the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the 'PULL' and 'PUSH' levers, the motor, and the full width of the base.
description_view_3: Top-down view revealing the oval shape of the top section and the arrangement of the motor and cables at the back.
attribute_control_panel_layout: One hexagonal knob and a small lever on the front, two labeled levers ('PULL' and 'PUSH') on the side; no digital screens or additional buttons visible.
